Bash(curl -s -m 60 https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions -H 'Authorization: Bearer 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' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are a concise Indian-agriculture expert. Output minimal tokens. Reply with raw JSON only, no markdown."},{"role":"user","content":"Disease: Late Blight. Crop: Tomato.\\nReturn ONLY this JSON, all text very short:\\n{\\"summary\\":\\"<=20 words\\",\\"economicImpact\\":\\"<=10 words\\",\\"treatmentUrgency\\":\\"Immediate Action Required|Treat Within 1 Week|Preventive Measure\\",\\"pesticides\\":[{\\"name\\":\\"\\",\\"type\\":\\"Fungicide|Bactericide|Insecticide\\",\\"description\\":\\"<=15 words\\",\\"howToUse\\":[\\"<=8 words\\",\\"<=8 words\\"],\\"dosage\\":\\"e.g. 2 ml/litre\\",\\"frequency\\":\\"e.g. every 7 days\\",\\"safetyNote\\":\\"<=8 words\\"}],\\"nonPesticideMethods\\":[\\"<=8 words\\",\\"<=8 words\\"],\\"preventionTips\\":[\\"<=8 words\\",\\"<=8 words\\"]}\\nGive 2 pesticides common in India. Be terse."}],"temperature":0.3,"max_tokens":400}')

Bash(curl -s -m 60 https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions -H 'Authorization: Bearer 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' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"Output a single JSON object only."},{"role":"user","content":"Disease: Late Blight. Crop: Tomato. Keys: summary, economicImpact, treatmentUrgency, pesticides \(array of 2 objects with name,type,description,howToUse[2],dosage,frequency,safetyNote\), nonPesticideMethods[2], preventionTips[2]. All text very short. India."}],"temperature":0.2,"max_tokens":450,"response_format":{"type":"json_object"}}')
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['choices'][0]['message']['content']\); print\('--- USAGE', d['usage']['total_tokens']\)")

Bash(curl -s -m 60 https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions -H 'Authorization: Bearer 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' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Disease: Late Blight. Crop: Tomato. 2 pesticides common in India, short."}],"temperature":0.2,"max_tokens":450,"response_format":{"type":"json_schema","json_schema":{"name":"disease","strict":true,"schema":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"summary":{"type":"string"},"pesticides":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["summary","pesticides"]}}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 60 https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions -H 'Authorization: Bearer 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' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"Output ONE JSON object only, no markdown. Every array of strings must contain plain strings, never objects."},{"role":"user","content":"Crop disease: Bacterial Spot on Pepper. Return JSON keys: summary\(string <=20 words\), economicImpact\(string <=10 words\), treatmentUrgency\(one of \\"Immediate Action Required\\",\\"Treat Within 1 Week\\",\\"Preventive Measure\\"\), pesticides\(array of EXACTLY 2 objects each with name, type\(Fungicide/Bactericide/Insecticide\), description\(<=15 words\), howToUse\(array of 2 short strings\), dosage, frequency, safetyNote\(<=8 words\)\), nonPesticideMethods\(array of 2 short strings\), preventionTips\(array of 2 short strings\). Pesticides common in India."}],"temperature":0.2,"max_tokens":420,"response_format":{"type":"json_object"}}')

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['choices'][0]['message']['content']\); print\('--- total_tokens', d['usage']['total_tokens'], 'finish', d['choices'][0]['finish_reason']\)")

Bash(curl -s -m 60 https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions -H 'Authorization: Bearer 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' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are AgriAI, an assistant for Indian farmers. Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d['choices'][0]['message']['content']; print\(c\); print\('--- words', len\(c.split\(\)\), 'total_tokens', d['usage']['total_tokens'], 'finish', d['choices'][0]['finish_reason']\)")
